name: doors
description: Always use for any Doors project work. Covers the Go server-side UI framework, reactive state, typed routing, events, auth, sessions, resources, and GoX template boundaries.

interface.longDescription: Always use this skill for creating, editing, reviewing, debugging, or extending Doors applications, even for small changes. Covers reactive state (Source/Beam), typed routing, GoX template boundaries, components, events, navigation, styling, auth, sessions, and background data.
defaultPrompt: Use Doors conventions to implement this feature.
Review this Doors project for routing, state management, and component patterns.
